name: /space-export invokes the PII guard on every record before writing the output file
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/space && printf '{"id":"m1","note":"contact me at alice@example.com or 555-123-4567"}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/space/collected.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/space-export.sh" --collected .claude-tdd-pro/space/collected.jsonl --out export.json 2>err.txt && grep -q 'pii_guard=invoked' err.txt && ! grep -q 'alice@example.com' export.json && ! grep -q '555-123-4567' export.json && echo ok 1>&2
